name: Cinnamon Oatmeal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F. Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners.
Combine milk and oatmeal in a bowl, then add oil, egg whites, sugar, cinnamon,
and grated orange zest. Mix until well combined.
In a separate bowl, combine flour and baking powder. Add the mixture of
milk, oatmeal, oil, egg whites, sugar, cinnamon, and zest; stir until just
blended.
Gently fold in any optional chopped apple pieces (peeled).
Bake for 15-18 minutes, or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
Makes 12 muffins.
